productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Ferrari Lifestyle Black Cap
description: CompositionBlack cap made of 100% cotton, with eyelets on the panels, branded tape on the inside on the seam lines, metal clasp closure at the back, Scudera ferrari badge printed on the front with embroidered detailing, Scudera Ferrari badge on the back and stripe print on the vizorWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Do not wring Stretch to original shape while damp Get ready to bring out the racing demon in you with this Scudera Ferrari cap from puma. The eyelets keep you cool while the sleek styling with the Ferrari seal and the badge at the back makes this  one coveted cap. Team it with your sporting clothes or casuals when you go out in the sun and carry the Ferrari spirit wherever you go.
